rows.label: qev017701_MSG0001
rows.name: Thanks for coming, [ST:playername ]![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0002
rows.name:
I finally found it! The
final data unit, FN097![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0003
rows.name:
The signal came from Kurogane no
Tairiku. It's a dangerous place,
but you'll be fine, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirmative

rows.label: qev017701_SEL0011
rows.name: State that you can go anytime.

rows.label: qev017701_JNK0020
rows.name: Anxiety

rows.label: qev017701_SEL0021
rows.name: State that you are anxious given your current abilities.

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0004
rows.name:
I've never seen a BLADE like you, not
even among the elite Pathfinders.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0005
rows.name:
What are you talking about? You're
underestimating yourself way too much.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0006
rows.name:
Besides, you have the backup of the
Frontier Net you've expanded so far.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0007
rows.name:
I guarantee it, you'll be able
to fully accomplish your mission
even in Kurogane no Tairiku.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0008
rows.name:
Please, in order to develop
this NLA into the wonderful
city my comrades desired...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0009
rows.name:
Gathering Miranium, and
defeating the Desert Knox
rampaging in Kurogane no Tairiku.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0010
rows.name: And the recovery of Data Unit FN097[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0011
rows.name:
Could I ask this of you? Please
find the final fragment entrusted
to us by my comrades.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0012
rows.name:
"Next-Generation Frontier Net"[ST:wide ]— I
have no idea what it actually is.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0013
rows.name:
It was research conducted voluntarily
with barely any budget, so I doubt
it's at a practical level.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0014
rows.name:
But, the comrades who continued their research
for the future of humanity, forgetting to
eat and sleep aboard the White Whale...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0015
rows.name:
I'm certain it's filled with
their deepest feelings[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0016
rows.name:
I'm counting on you.
Make sure you get it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirmative

rows.label: qev017701_SEL0031
rows.name: Nod quietly.

rows.label: qev017701_JNK0040
rows.name: Negative

rows.label: qev017701_SEL0041
rows.name: State that you won't go along with such a personal request.

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0017
rows.name:
Because it's a personal matter,
I was really scared to confide
this to you, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0018
rows.name:
I'm glad I told you. Please make absolutely
sure to succeed in this mission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0019
rows.name:
Thank you for the accurate observation.
Perhaps I am getting too sentimental.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0020
rows.name:
...But please, make absolutely
sure to succeed in this mission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0021
rows.name:
We can never have enough Miranium
to survive on this planet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0022
rows.name:
Please, for the sake of humanity, and
to reward the feelings of my comrades[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0023
rows.name:
Make absolutely sure to
succeed in this mission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0024
rows.name:
Many people are eagerly awaiting
the Miranium you bring in.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0025
rows.name:
5500gm of Miranium[ST:wide ]— If you've
obtained it like always, please
hand it over quickly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_JNK0050
rows.name: Hand over

rows.label: qev017701_SEL0051
rows.name: Hand over 5500gm of Miranium.

rows.label: qev017701_JNK0060
rows.name: Do not hand over

rows.label: qev017701_SEL0061
rows.name: Do not hand it over for now.

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0026
rows.name:
You're the only one in all of NLA
who can obtain this much Miranium.
Really, thank you as always...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0027
rows.name:
Thank you. I'll leave the missions
in Kurogane no Tairiku... to you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0029
rows.name:
I understand, I trust your judgment.
I'm sure there's a deep reason why you
can't hand it over right now, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0030
rows.name:
This is enough Miranium. I'm
counting on you for the missions
in Kurogane no Tairiku.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0031
rows.name:
Make sure you grasp the dreams
entrusted by my comrades.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0032
rows.name:
Hehe, I know, mission accomplished[ST:wide ]—
right? I have indeed received the
final Data Unit as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0033
rows.name:
Let me say this not as an Operations
Manager, but as a single developer.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0034
rows.name: Thank you. I am truly grateful to you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0035
rows.name:
I shouldn't be the one to say
this, but Frontier Net is a
highly superior system.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0036
rows.name:
But without a user like you, it's
meaningless. Just a bunch of Data Probes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0037
rows.name:
Only because there was a BLADE
like you, did the system everyone
built together become complete.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_JNK0070
rows.name: Conviction

rows.label: qev017701_SEL0071
rows.name: Nod proudly, agreeing with Kirsty's words.

rows.label: qev017701_JNK0080
rows.name: Gratitude

rows.label: qev017701_SEL0081
rows.name: Thank Kirsty and her team for creating such a convenient system.

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0038
rows.name:
If everyone was here, we'd throw a party
and introduce you to them, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0039
rows.name:
If you say that, I'm sure
everyone would be happy...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0040
rows.name:
...Now, please accept your reward. Truly,
thank you for everything up until now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0041
rows.name:
Alright... With this, all the
Data Units are gathered...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0042
rows.name:
Since there's no one left who
was involved, and it's protected
by complex encryption...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0043
rows.name:
It doesn't look like I'll be able to peek
inside easily, but... I'll do my best to
solve the homework everyone left.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0044
rows.name:
In the meantime, please continue to
use Frontier Net just like before,
and save as many people as you can.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_JNK0090
rows.name: Affirmative

rows.label: qev017701_SEL0091
rows.name: Say that you will accept Kirsty's feelings.

rows.label: qev017701_JNK0100
rows.name: Negative

rows.label: qev017701_SEL0101
rows.name: Declare that you will use it to satisfy your own desires.

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0045
rows.name:
Thank you. Once I confirm the data
inside, I'll report to you first, so
please come see me once in a while.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0046
rows.name:
I'd like to hear all sorts of
stories about how you're using
Frontier Net in the future too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0047
rows.name:
How greedy... You sound
just like Tobias.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017701_MSG0048
rows.name: I pray you don't end up like him.[ST:wait ]
